sections.paragraph:
Original: סיפניא סוּמפּניה סוּמפּוניה o

Transliteration: sûmpôneyâh sûmpôneyâh sı̂yphôneyâ'

Phonetic: soom-po-neh-yaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. a musical instrument, wind instrument, bagpipe, double pipe, panpipes
    1. perhaps dulcimer, panpipes

Origin: of Greek origin

TWOT entry: 2887

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
